_HOW_TO_USE: To cover a new city: add it to the 'cities' list below (format: 'City, TN'), commit this file, then go to the Actions tab -> 'Refresh Restaurants' -> 'Run workflow'. That's the entire process. The monthly scheduled run will include it automatically from then on. For large cities, add extra searches under 'extraQueries' to get past Google's 60-results-per-search cap.
